Feed the Effort.
Manifesto

Most food shouts. Ours doesn't. It just shows up - protein-rich, properly made, ready when you are.

FUUL is built for the rhythm of a working day in a real city. Hot-honey chicken at lunch, a salmon bowl after the gym, a 50g protein shake on the walk back to the desk. Three macronutrients. One signature. Zero theatre.

Unit Economics

The model works.

A single mature site reaches £87k monthly revenue at a blended AOV of £13.00, delivering a 23.5% EBITDA margin. Full payback in 25 months. Built on commissary delivery with no kitchen buildout.

Source: internal model · Site 1 mature year · 225 tx/day × £13.00

Blended AOV
£13.00
Contribution Margin
£8.05
Food COGS
32%
EBITDA Margin (Mature)
23.5%
Full Payback
25mo
Smoothies & Shakes

The Attach Effect.

40% shake attach rate adds £3.20 to every transaction. 20% snack attach adds £0.50. Together they build the £13.00 blended AOV that makes the model work.

40% Shake Attach 20% Snack Attach 32g+ Per Shake
Shakes & Smoothies · 31–50g
Average Order Value Breakdown
£13.00Every transaction. Every day.
Food · Bowls, wraps & breakfast£9.25 · 71%
Shake · 40% attach · £8.00 × 40%£3.20 · 25%
Snack · 20% attach · £2.50 × 20%£0.50 · 4%
× 225 tx/day × 29 trading days = £85,072/mo mature revenue
Transaction Ramp · Site 1

From soft launch to steady state in 9 months.

40 tx/day at open → 225 mature state (Month 9). Break-even at 140 tx/day (Month 7+). Driven by morning commuter discovery and a building lunchtime regular base.

Conservative · contemplates no marketing spend beyond launch.

Month 1
Site Opens · Kings Cross

Coal Drops Yard. Brand and operating model live on a single high-footfall site.

Month 7
First EBITDA-Positive Month

Break-even at 140 tx/day. Pre-opening costs fully amortised by Month 6. Cash generation begins.

Month 9
Mature State Reached

225 tx/day. Playbook documented. Every subsequent month cash-generative. Site 2 scouting underway.

Year 2 – Year 3
Site 2 Opens · Group

Second site proves replication. Third site follows. Group EBITDA margin expands. FUUL is a group.
